zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret de Hastings於1353年出生在英國越可爾約克約克 卡素時，她的父親Ralph Hastings24歲，母親Lady Ralph Hastings15歲。她於大約1370年與Roger de Héron在英國結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1407年3月29日在英國萊希斯特斯爾諾瑟利享年54歲，埋葬在英國坎布利其爾可洛頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret de Hastings于1353年出生在英国越可爾約克約克 卡素时，她的父亲Ralph Hastings24岁，母亲Lady Ralph Hastings15岁。她于大约1370年与Roger de Héron在英国结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1407年3月29日在英国萊希斯特斯爾諾瑟利享年54岁，埋葬在英国坎布利其爾可洛頓。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Hastings
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish: habitational name from Hastings (Sussex), near which the English army was defeated by the Normans in 1066. The placename derives from an Old English personal name Hǣsta + the Old English groupname suffix -ingas. In the latter part of the 12th century, at the time of William the Lion, the surname was taken to Scotland, where it assimilated instances of the native Scottish surname Harestane.
English: variant of Hasting with Middle English genitival -s.
Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó hOistín ‘descendant of Oistín’, the Gaelic form of the personal name Augustine (see Austin ).

variants.name: Hasting
meanings: English: from the Norman personal name Hastang, Hastenc, Hasten (Old Norse Hásteinn ‘high’ + ‘stone’). See also Hastings .

variants.name: Heston
meanings: English: habitational name from Heston (Middlesex) or Histon (Cambridgeshire). The Middlesex placename derives from Old English hǣs ‘brushwood’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’, while the Cambridgeshire placename may derive from Old English hyse ‘shoot, tendril’, also ‘son, youth’, + tūn.

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret de Hastings was born in 1353, in York Castle, York, Yorkshire, England, her father, Ralph Hastings, was 24 and her mother, Lady Ralph Hastings, was 15. She married Roger de Héron about 1370, in England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 29 March 1407, in Noseley, Leicestershire, England, at the age of 54, and was buried in Croydon, Cambridgeshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret de Hastings est née en 1353, à York Castle, York, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Ralph Hastings, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Lady Ralph Hastings, avait 15 ans. Elle a épousé Roger de Héron environ 1370, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 29 mars 1407, à Noseley, Leicestershire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 54 ans, et a été enterrée à Croydon, Cambridgeshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margaret de Hastings 1353 in York Castle, York, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Ralph Hastings 24 und ihre Mutter Lady Ralph Hastings 15. Sie hat um 1370 in England Roger de Héron geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 29. März 1407 im Alter von 54 Jahren in Noseley, Leicestershire, England und wurde in Croydon, Cambridgeshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret de Hastings è nata il nel 1353 nel York Castle, York, Yorkshire, England, sua padre, Ralph Hastings, aveva 24 anni e sua madre, Lady Ralph Hastings, aveva 15 anni. Lei sposato Roger de Héron circa 1370, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 29 marzo 1407, nel Noseley, Leicestershire, England, all'età di 54 anni, e fu sepolta a Croydon, Cambridgeshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret de Hastingsが1353年にイギリスヨークシュアイアヨークヨーク カストルで生まれた時，父Ralph Hastingsは24歳，母Lady Ralph Hastingsは15歳であった。約1370年にイギリスでRoger de Héronと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1407年3月29日にイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアノセリーで54歳で死去し，イギリスカンブリジェシュアイアクロイドンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret de Hastings(이)가 1353년 영국 요르크실르 요르크 요르크 카스틀에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Ralph Hastings(은)는 24세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Ralph Hastings(은)는 15세였다. 그녀는 대략 1370년 영국에서 Roger de Héron(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1407년 3월 29일 영국 레이스스터실르 노셀이에서 54세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 캄브리지실르 크로이던에 묻혔다.

mn.Ford, Glendale, Northumberland, England: Ford, Norðhymbra land, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret de Hastings nasceu em 1353, em York Castle, York, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Ralph Hastings, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Lady Ralph Hastings, tinha 15 anos. Ela casou-se com Roger de Héron aproximadamente 1370, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 29 de março de 1407, em Noseley, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, com 54 anos, e foi sepultada em Croydon, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret de Hastings родилась в 1353 г. в местности ерк кастл, ерк, еркшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Ralph Hastings было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Lady Ralph Hastings, 15. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Roger de Héron около 1370 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла 29 марта 1407 г. в местности носели, лисестиршир, Англия в возрасте 54 лет и была похоронена в местности кроидон, камбриджешир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margaret de Hastings nació en 1353, en York Castle, York, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Ralph Hastings, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Lady Ralph Hastings, tenía 15 años. Se casó con Roger de Héron aproximadamente 1370, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 29 de marzo de 1407, en Noseley, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 54 años, y fue sepultada en Croydon, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra.
